title: Guaranteed Selection Result Schema
description: Discriminated, fail-closed result of a guaranteed optimizer mode. deployable is true ONLY for CERTIFIED_SELECTION, and only then is selected_config populated; every other status carries a fallback_config and a null selected_config, so an uncertified config can never occupy the slot a consumer deploys from. Carries the GuaranteeCertificate as evidence.

deployable.description: True only for CERTIFIED_SELECTION (enforced below). Deploy gates MUST require this true.

selected_config.description: The certified config to deploy. Non-null ONLY for CERTIFIED_SELECTION.

fallback_config.description: The config to keep running when nothing is certified (baseline for Mode 1, peak for Mode 2).
